data.title: Hageman Teases Run for Cynthia Lummis’ Seat With ‘Soon’ Video — What It Means for Crypto
data.description:
Wyoming Rep. Harriet Hageman has fueled speculation about a 2026 Senate run after posting a cryptic “Soon” video, days following Senator Cynthia Lummis’ announcement that she will not seek reelection.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hageman-run-lummis-senate-crypto/

data.title: U.S. economy sees 4.3% GDP growth in third quarter
data.description:
The U. S. economy expanded by 4. 3% in the third quarter of 2025, based on fresh numbers released Tuesday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis. That growth rate caught most economists off guard, especially since Bloomberg’s survey of forecasters had pegged the number at just 3. 2%. The new GDP data comes after weeks of delay caused […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-economy-sees-4-3-gdp-growth/

data.title: Architect Financial Technologies, founded by the former president of FTX US, has raised $35 million in funding at a valuation of $187 million.
data.description: Former FTX US president Brett Harrison has raised $35 million for his newly founded Architect Financial Technologies, valuing the company at approximately $187 million. Its exchange, AX, focuses on perpetual contracts for traditional assets (stocks and forex), rather than crypto perpetual contracts. The platform is reportedly regulated in Bermuda and is only open to non-US institutional investors because perpetual futures products have not yet been approved in the US. (The Information)

data.title: Grayscale transferred approximately 616 BTC, worth nearly $54 million, to Coinbase Prime.
data.description: According to Arkham, Grayscale transferred a total of approximately 615.961 BTC, worth about $53.94 million, to Coinbase Prime through its Bitcoin exchange-traded fund and Bitcoin mini-trust.

data.title: The market capitalization of Ethena's stablecoin USDe has shrunk by nearly half since the "October 11th crash".
data.description: Ethena's synthetic stablecoin USDe has seen its market capitalization shrink by nearly half since the "10/11 crash," with a net outflow of approximately $8.3 billion. Data from CoinMarketCap shows that as of October 9th, USDe's market capitalization was close to $14.7 billion; however, in just over two months, it has fallen to approximately $6.4 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The Gnosis Chain community has decided to take a hard fork to recover funds stolen in the Balancer vulnerability incident.
data.description: Gnosis Chain announced that its operator community has decided to implement a hard fork to recover funds lost in the Balancer vulnerability incident. These funds are now out of the hackers' control. Previously, Gnosis stated that it had collaborated with the Monerium and Balancer teams to freeze some affected pools and temporarily restricted cross-chain asset transfers from the Gnosis chain via standard bridges. The Gnosis team will continue to work with ecosystem partners and remind remaining node operators to take action to avoid penalties.

data.title: Gnosis Chain to Implement Hard Fork for Fund Recovery
data.description:
According to PANews, Gnosis Chain has announced that its operator community has decided to execute a hard fork to recover funds lost in a previous Balancer vulnerability incident. These funds are now beyond the control of the hackers.

Previously, Gnosis stated that it had collaborated with Monerium and the Balancer team to freeze some affected liquidity pools and temporarily restricted cross-chain asset transfers from the Gnosis Chain via standard bridges. The Gnosis team will continue to work with ecosystem partners and has advised remaining node operators to take action to avoid penalties.

data.title: ARK ETFs Divest Tesla Shares Worth $29.67 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, Cathie Wood's ARK Invest disclosed that on Monday, its ARK Innovation ETF, ARK Next Generation Internet ETF, and ARK Autonomous Technology ETF collectively sold 60,715 shares of Tesla (TSLA.O), valued at approximately $29.67 million.

data.title: Yardeni Research raises its gold price forecast: aiming for $6,000 in 2026 and $10,000 in 2029.
data.description: On the last full trading day before the Christmas holidays, US stocks are expected to close flat, despite a relatively dense day of data releases. Yardeni Research, an independent investment research firm founded by Wall Street veteran and senior strategist Ed Yardeni, has just raised its target price for gold next year. The firm stated, "At the beginning of this year, when gold prices broke through $3,000 per ounce, we predicted it would reach $4,000 by the end of the year and $5,000 by the end of next year. With gold prices breaking through $4,500, we have raised our target for the end of 2026 to $6,000, and still expect gold prices to reach $10,000 by the end of this year (end of 2029)." (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. GDP Data Influences Dollar Index and Euro Exchange Rate
data.description: According to Odaily, following the release of U.S. GDP data, the Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a slight increase of 10 points, currently standing at 97.96. Meanwhile, the Euro to U.S. Dollar exchange rate (EUR/USD) saw a minor decline, now reported at 1.18.

data.title: U.S. Economic Data Impacts S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 Futures
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, following the release of U.S. economic data, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures fell to their pre-market lows.

data.title: Cathie Wood's various funds sold 60,715 Tesla shares, worth approximately $29.67 million.
data.description: According to the daily trading disclosure of Cathie Wood's ETFs, her ARK Innovation ETF, ARK Next Generation Internet ETF, and ARK Autonomous Driving Technology ETF collectively sold 60,715 shares of Tesla (TSLA.O) on Monday, worth approximately $29.67 million. (Jinshi)

data.title: The initial estimate for the annualized real GDP of the United States in the third quarter was $24,025 billion, compared to $23,771 billion in the previous quarter.
data.description: The preliminary estimate for the US third-quarter annualized real GDP was $24,025 billion, compared to $23,771 billion in the previous quarter. Following the release of the GDP data, spot gold briefly fell by $5, currently trading at $4,486.58 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Third Quarter GDP Growth Exceeds Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the United States' real GDP for the third quarter showed an annualized growth rate of 4.3%. This figure surpasses the anticipated 3.3% and the previous quarter's rate of 3.8%.

data.title: The US dollar index rose 10 points after the release of US GDP data, last trading at 97.96.
data.description: Following the release of US GDP data, the US dollar index (DXY) rose slightly by 10 points, last trading at 97.96. The euro fell slightly against the US dollar (EUR/USD), currently trading at 1.18. (Jinshi)

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches New Funds Focused on Stablecoin and Tokenization Technologies
data.description: According to Odaily, asset management firm Amplify ETFs has introduced two new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) that focus on stablecoin and tokenization technologies. The Amplify Stablecoin Technology ETF (STBQ) is dedicated to stablecoin technology, while The Amplify Tokenization Technology ETF (TKNQ) targets tokenization technology. Both ETFs have an expense ratio of 69 basis points and track specific MarketVector indices.

data.title: ADP Weekly Employment Report: Private sector employers added an average of 11,500 jobs per week in the four weeks ending December 6.
data.description: According to data disclosed in ADP's weekly employment report, in the four weeks ending December 6, 2025, private sector employers added an average of 11,500 jobs per week. (Jinshi)

data.title: SharpLink received 460 ETH in staking rewards last week, bringing its total staking rewards to 9701 ETH.
data.description: Ethereum treasury company SharpLink released data showing that it received 460 ETH in staking rewards last week, bringing its total staking rewards to 9,701 ETH since the launch of its staking strategy.

data.title: Spot silver rose more than 2% on the day, currently trading at $70.40 per ounce.
data.description: Market data shows that spot silver rose more than 2.00% intraday, currently trading at $70.40 per ounce. New York silver futures extended their gains to 3.00% intraday, currently trading at $70.63 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: BC Card Completes Stablecoin Payment Pilot for Foreign Users
data.description: According to Odaily, South Korean credit card company BC Card has successfully completed a pilot project for stablecoin payments. This initiative enables foreign users to pay local merchants using stablecoins. Users can convert stablecoins stored in overseas wallets partnered with BC Card into digital prepaid cards.
